data.title: Shiba Inu Burns 13 Million SHIB In One Transaction, But Daily Transactions Plummet: What's Going On?
data.description:
Despite a 30.4% decline in Shiba Inu's (CRYPTO: SHIB) price over the past month, the community continues its burn mechanism to reduce supply. However, the latest burn rate remains weak, signaling a limited impact on price momentum.

source: https://www.benzinga.com/markets/cryptocurrency/25/02/43795751/shiba-inu-burns-13-million-shib-in-one-transaction-but-daily-transactions-plummet-whats-go?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: OpenSea ends XP rewards for listing & bidding due to community backlash
data.description:
OpenSea has decided to pause its new XP rewards for listing and bidding on NFTs on the platform after backlash from the community.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/opensea-ends-xp-rewards-for-listing-bidding/

data.title: FTX announces next repayment round for May
data.description:
The bankrupted crypto exchange started repaying its creditors on Feb. 18, over two years after its dramatic collapse.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ftx-next-repayment-distribution-may-2025?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Hayden Davis Opens Up After LIBRA Crypto Controversy: Confirms Involvement in MELANIA Coin Launch
data.description:
In a recent interview with Coffeezilla, cryptocurrency launch strategist Hayden Davis broke his silence on the controversial LIBRA crypto launch and confirmed his involvement in the MELANIA token project. Davis, who currently controls approximately $100 million in funds from the LIBRA crypto launch, shared details about the mechanics of high-profile meme coin launches, including project...
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/02/18/hayden-davis-opens-up-after-libra-crypto-controversy-confirms-involvement-in-melania-coin-launch/

data.title:
$BTC Starting to trade below its mid range and high volume node after consolidating at that area for a while.

My main focus is still on being patient and waiting for either of the range extremes to be tapped to look for potential trades.
CZ Refutes Binance Sale Rumors After Recent Asset Transfers
data.description:
Despite asset transfer speculation, CZ confirms Binance is not for sale, though the exchange is open to strategic partnerships and mergers.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/cz-refutes-binance-sale-rumors-after-recent-asset-transfers/

data.title: Dogecoin, Cardano Among Four Iconic Altcoins: Trader Sees 'Pretty Close To An End To This Chop'
data.description:
Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has been stuck in a multi-week range, leaving altcoins struggling for momentum. However, traders believe this consolidation phase could be setting the stage for an altseason breakout.

source: https://www.benzinga.com/markets/cryptocurrency/25/02/43795227/dogecoin-cardano-among-four-iconic-altcoins-trader-sees-pretty-close-to-an-end-to-this-cho?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: Abstract Chain users have been compromised, most likely linked to Cardex app
data.description:
Abstract Chain saw an ongoing, widespread attack of drained wallets. Abstract wallets, which gave a permission to Web3 apps, are getting drained of ETH, with estimates for losses between 9.9 ETH and up to 300 ETH.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/abstract-chain-users-compromised/

data.title: Will Michael Saylor’s ’21 rules of Bitcoin’ reignite investors’ confidence?
data.description:
Michael Saylor shares 21 Bitcoin rules, emphasizing its financial revolution, decentralization, and long-term value.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/will-michael-saylors-21-rules-of-bitcoin-reignite-investors-confidence/

data.title: Why Litecoin Won’t Break Out—Analytics Firm Reveals the Cause
data.description:
The market intelligence platform IntoTheBlock has explained the reason why Litecoin has been stuck inside the $90 to $130 range recently. Litecoin Exchange Netflow Has Followed An Interesting Pattern Recently In a new post on X, the analytics firm IntoTheBlock has discussed about a pattern that the Litecoin Exchange Netflow has shown during the recent phase of consolidation in the asset’s...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/litecoin/litecoin-break-out-analytics-firm-reveals-cause/
